name: aw_article_sections
comment: Stores rendered article sections and article metadata for Abstract Wikipedia topics.

columns.name: awas_topic_qid
columns.comment: Wikidata QID of the AW article topic (e.g. Q42)

columns.name: awas_section_qid
columns.comment: Section identifier (QID-like) or METADATA literal for article metadata entry

columns.name: awas_locale
columns.comment: BCP47 locale identifier (e.g. en, sr-Latn, zh-Hans)

columns.name: awas_schema_version
columns.comment: Schema version of the stored payload format

columns.name: awas_payload
columns.comment: HTML fragment for section, or JSON blob with metadata for article metadata entry

columns.name: awas_last_updated
columns.comment: ISO-8601 timestamp when content was last updated
